name: triager
description: Per-issue dispatch: classify ONE open GitHub Issue (kind:impl|kind:consider|kind:design) and assign a unique order:N work-order label. Labels are applied via the poll:state boundary hook (gh issue edit) using the AI structured output's issue.labels.add field. Use the .agent/triager/script/dispatch.sh ad-hoc dispatcher to fan out unlabeled issues; this binary handles ONE issue per invocation.

issue.description: GitHub Issue number to triage in this invocation (per-issue dispatch).

repository.description: Optional owner/repo override for gh state checks. Default: current repo (gh context).

workflow.description: Path to the downstream workflow JSON used to derive the workflow label set (labelMapping keys + prioritizer.labels). The triager refuses to label an issue that already carries any workflow label.
